name: Multi-Cloud & FinOps Management
description: Centralized multi-cloud governance through Multi Cloud Connectivity Platform and Future Cloud Infrastructure, with structured FinOps maturity assessment, continuous cost management, and embedded compliance controls for BSI C5, GDPR, and local regulation.
positioning: Cost transparency and governance across all cloud estates. Particularly relevant as enterprise cloud sprawl increases and CFOs demand accountability.
competitive_moat: Multi-cloud visibility across T-Systems-managed and third-party estates
